text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Review of Functional Data Analysis" by Jane-Ling Wang, Jeng-Min Chiou, and Hans-Georg Müller is confirmed real, appearing on arXiv (1507.05135) and published in the *Annual Review of Statistics and Its Application*, vol. 3(1), pp. 257–295. The cited authors and venue match exactly; the year is listed as 2016 in the reference but the paper was published in the 2016 volume (submitted 2015), a negligible discrepancy.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1507.05135
